mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua 在 31 步时因 ProxyError 中断。在中断前，mano-cua 同样无法在编辑器中输入文本。绕过代理重试（sess-20260416173852）网络稳定但编辑器交互问题依旧——mano-cua 跑了 40+ 步仍无法在 ProseMirror 编辑器中输入任何文字。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The editor is not accepting keyboard input. The cursor appears after clicking but typing doesn't produce visible text.
